/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO TERMINATE GEOGRAPHIC RESTRAINING ORDER/MO GRTD/X:NOTICE OF TERMINATION OF PROTECTIVE ORDER IN CRIMINAL PROCEEDINGS FILED,/X:(PROBATION WAS PREVIOUSLY TERMINATED,)/

/X:SEE MINUTES OF 11-18-05, DEPARTMENT 15,//X:DEFENSE MOTION TO REDUCE 32 PC FELONY TO 32 PC MISDEAMENOR PUR TO 17B PC,/MO GRTD/IRRC/FAWC/DISM3/TWS/CTORD:$160 MAY BE RETURNED TO DEFT; BY STIPORDER FOR RETURN OF PROP SIGNED BY HON S BREALL,/TWS/CH3:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3Y:PJ 23D/CTS:23/WS/SECFEE/VF1//CTORD:DEF STAY AWAY FROM (OR NO LOITERING) FROM AREA BOUNDED BY THIRD STREET AKA KEARNY STREET ON THE EAST; HOWARD STREET ON THE SOUTH; PINE ON THE NORTH AND POLK ON THE WEST,/OBEY/ACCEP/CTORD:TRIAL DATE VACATED,/

/CAL:PRE TRIAL CONF/X:DA AMEND COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 3: 32 PC FELONY/IRRC/FAWC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PER WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G//DEFT ADV RTS:3/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:12-16-05//CTORD:PRE SENTENCE REPORT RETURNED TO DEPT 15/X:TRIAL DATE OF 12-16-05 REMAINS IN D22//X:PROPOSED SENTENCE: AT TIME OF SENTENCING 32 PC WILL BE REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANOR FOR ISS, 3 YR CT PROB; WS, STAY AWAY OR NO LOITERINR; DAWDLING THIRDST-KEARNY ST ON THE EAST; HOWARD ST ON THE SOUTH; PINE ST ON THE NORTH & POLK ST ON THE WEST; CTS: 23 DAYS/X:IN VIEW OF THIS PLEA, #2238328 DISCHARGED/CTORD:SPR VACATED/OR/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:THIS DATE SHOULD HAVE BEEN VACATED /X:FUTURE DATE OF 08-31-05 IS CONFIRMED/
/CAL:TRANSFERRED FROM DEPT 22 FOR PTC/X:DA RICHARD HECKLER NOT PRESENT,//CONTD:FOR DA'S APP FOR FUR PTC/CTORD:TRIAL DATE OF DEC 16, 2005 REMAINS/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/GTW/987,2/
